stemHtml: What kind of weather characteristics can be expected in the northern hemisphere after a cold front has passed?

options.a: Winds: from north-west to north Pressure: rising steadily Precipitation: intensifying showers
options.b: Winds: from north to north-east Pressure: dropping, then rising Precipitation: showers, then clearing
options.c: Winds: from south-west to north-west Pressure: dropping, then rising Precipitation: intensifying showers
options.d: Winds: from west to north-west Pressure: rising steadily Precipitation: showers, then clearing
